CommonErrors.invalidRefreshToken: Your session expired. Sign in again.
CommonErrors.invalidPasswordResetToken: Invalid or expired password reset token.
CommonErrors.authenticationRequired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
CommonErrors.networkError: Unable to connect to the backend. Check if the API is running.
CommonErrors.invalidApiResponse: The API returned an unexpected format. Check the backend configuration.

Brand.note: "Cooking with care and organizing your family's day."

login.title: Welcome to the notebook
login.subtitle: Sign in to see what's for dinner today.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join the table and keep recipes, profile and progress as a family.
register.name: Your name
register.success: Account created successfully. You can sign in now.

forgot.title: Let's prepare a new password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and, if it exists, we'll send the path back to the notebook.
forgot.success: If the email exists, reset instructions will be sent.

reset.title: Change your notebook key
reset.subtitle: Paste the token you received and choose a strong password to return to planning.
reset.success: Password reset successfully. You can sign in with the new password.

accessHelp.title: Let's unlock your access
accessHelp.subtitle: A few quick checks solve most local login issues.

items.title: I can't sign in
items.description: Check if the Gelu - Menu backend is running at http://localhost:8080/api/v1. If you see a fetch failure, the API may be off or another app may be using port 8080.

items.title: I forgot my password
items.description: Use password recovery. In local development, the dev token appears on screen when the backend is configured to expose it.

items.title: I was sent out of the internal area
items.description: This happens when the local session expired or the backend rejected the token. Sign in again to create a fresh session.

Shell.footer: Made to organize the kitchen routine with care.

Profile.title: Profile and weight
Profile.guestDescription: Sign in to edit your profile and record your weight.
Profile.personalDescription: Body data and goals stay in your profile. Email is not editable in this sprint.
Profile.name: Name
Profile.logoutTitle: Do you really want to sign out?
Profile.logoutText: Your session will end on this device.

Evolution.title: Weight history
Evolution.guestDescription: Sign in to view your history.
Evolution.emptyChart: Record your first weight to draw the curve.
Evolution.initialReminder: Record your initial weight to track monthly progress.
Evolution.monthlyReminder: It has been 30 days or more since the last record. Update your weight.

Dashboard.description: Your daily notebook brings together meals, training, weight and next ideas to keep the household routine organized.
Dashboard.aiDescription: A creamy soup with lean protein fits today's calorie balance and helps close the night without weighing down the routine.
Dashboard.trainingDescription: 35 minutes planned to move the afternoon.
Dashboard.goalBased: Based on a {goal} kcal goal and mocked meals for the day.
Dashboard.pendingInvitesDescription: No pending family invites for now. The family module will be enabled in a future sprint.
suggestions: Swap the snack for an option with more protein.
Set aside washed vegetables to speed up dinner.
Record this week's weight to update your progress.

Recipes.title: Recipes
Recipes.description: Save household dishes with ingredients, preparation, time and estimated calories.
Recipes.emptyText: Start by saving a simple recipe to build your notebook.

Landing.eyebrow: Food, routine and care in one place
Landing.title: Organize the household menu like a living notebook.
Landing.description: Gelu - Menu brings recipes, weekly diet, family space, weight progress, training and AI suggestions into a warm, visual and simple experience.
Landing.progressText: Record weight and goals without losing the feeling of a personal planner.

features.title: Family recipes
features.description: Save dish ideas, organize favorites and prepare the notebook for the routine.

features.title: Profile and progress
features.description: Track personal data, goals and weight history in a light visual experience.

features.title: Weekly planner
features.description: Plan meals, workouts and smart suggestions in the same place.

Placeholder.prepared: This visual page follows the screen design, but the business rule will be implemented in its sprint.

descriptions.help: FAQ, tickets, suggestions and system rating will be implemented in Sprint 10.
descriptions.weeklyDiet: The weekly planner with meals, recipes and family members will be built in the diet sprints.
descriptions.family: Family space, members, permissions and email invites enter the family sprints.
descriptions.recipes: Listing, filters, favorites and recipe creation start in Sprint 3.
descriptions.ai: Smart chef tips will connect to the AI module when Sprint 11 starts.
